author: Rachel Brown
review: My husband and I were selling off rental properties in preparation to retire and listed two properties with her at the same time. While she sold one within a week, the other would only appeal to a very small demographic of buyers. At no

ownerResponse.response: Thank you Rachel for your review of Andi Dyer, we always appreciate feedback for all kinds, but of course this was wonderful to hear. We are still here for you after the closing so let us know how we can help you at any time.

author: Eugene Julie
review: It was such a pleasure working with Andi Dyer at Sterling Real Estate. I would highly recommend her and her support staff. They were very attentive to my needs for my special situation. Thank you for tailoring a plan that worked for both.
